G3634.derivation: probably akin to G3588 (ὁ), G3739 (ὅς), and G3745 (ὅσος);
G3634.strongs_def: such or what sort of (as a correlation or exclamation); especially the neuter (adverbially) with negative, not so
G3634.kjv_def: so (as), such as, what (manner of), which

G3691.derivation: probably akin to the base of G188 (ἀκμήν) ("acid");

G3699.strongs_def: what(-ever) where, i.e. at whichever spot
G3699.kjv_def: in what place, where(-as, -soever), whither (+ soever)

G3683.derivation: from a derivative of G3685 (ὀνίνημι) and G5411 (φόρος);

G3613.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of G3611 (οἰκέω) (equivalent to G3612 (οἴκημα));

G3679.strongs_def: to defame, i.e. rail at, chide, taunt
G3679.kjv_def: cast in teeth, (suffer) reproach, revile, upbraid

G3672.derivation: adverb of present passive participle of G3670 (ὁμολογέω);

G3610.strongs_def: a fellow resident, i.e. menial domestic

G3622.strongs_def: administration (of a household or estate); specially, a (religious) "economy"

G3650.strongs_def: "whole" or "all", i.e. complete (in extent, amount, time or degree), especially (neuter) as noun or adverb
G3650.kjv_def: all, altogether, every whit, + throughout, whole

G3643.derivation: from a compound of G3641 (ὀλίγος) and ("care");
G3643.strongs_def: to have little regard for, i.e. to disesteem

G3603.derivation: from the neuter of G3739 (ὅς) and the third person singular present indicative of G1510 (εἰμί);
G3603.kjv_def: called, which is (make), that is (to say)

G3687.strongs_def: to name, i.e. assign an appellation; by extension, to utter, mention, profess

G3639.strongs_def: a prolonged form); ruin, i.e. death, punishment

G3674.strongs_def: akin to G260 (ἅμα)) as adverb; at the same place or time

G3656.strongs_def: to be in company with, i.e. (by implication) to converse

G3686.derivation: from a presumed derivative of the base of G1097 (γινώσκω) (compare G3685 (ὀνίνημι));

G3607.strongs_def: a linen cloth, i.e. (especially) a sail

G3648.strongs_def: complete in every part, i.e. perfectly sound (in body)

G3675.derivation: from the base of G3674 (ὁμοῦ) and G5424 (φρήν);

G3660.derivation: a prolonged form of a primary, but obsolete , for which another prolonged form is used in certain tenses;
G3660.strongs_def: to swear, i.e. take (or declare on) oath

G3625.derivation: feminine participle present passive of G3611 (οἰκέω) (as noun, by implication, of G1093 (γῆ));
G3625.strongs_def: land, i.e. the (terrene part of the) globe; specially, the Roman empire

G3641.strongs_def: puny (in extent, degree, number, duration or value); especially neuter (adverbially) somewhat
G3641.kjv_def: + almost, brief(-ly), few, (a) little, + long, a season, short, small, a while

G3673.derivation: from the base of G3674 (ὁμοῦ) and G5078 (τέχνη);

G3697.strongs_def: of what kind that, i.e. how (as) great (excellent) (specially, as an indefinite correlative to the definite antecedent G5108 (τοιοῦτος) of quality)
G3697.kjv_def: what manner (sort) of, such as whatsoever

G3670.derivation: from a compound of the base of G3674 (ὁμοῦ) and G3056 (λόγος);
G3670.kjv_def: con- (pro-)fess, confession is made, give thanks, promise

G3618.strongs_def: to be a house-builder, i.e. construct or (figuratively) confirm

G3624.strongs_def: a dwelling (more or less extensive, literal or figurative); by implication, a family (more or less related, literally or figuratively)

G3654.strongs_def: completely, i.e. altogether; (by analogy), everywhere; (negatively) not by any means

G3694.derivation: from the same as G3693 (ὄπισθεν) with enclitic of direction;
G3694.strongs_def: to the back, i.e. aback (as adverb or preposition of time or place; or as noun)

G3681.derivation: probably akin to the base of G3686 (ὄνομα);

G3658.derivation: from the base of G3674 (ὁμοῦ) and a derivative of the alternate of G138 (αἱρέομαι) (meaning a crowd);

G3698.strongs_def: what(-ever) then, i.e. (of time) as soon as

G3685.derivation: a prolonged form of an apparently primary verb (, to slur);
G3685.strongs_def: for which another prolonged form () is used as an alternate in some tenses (unless indeed it be identical with the base of G3686 (ὄνομα) through the idea of notoriety); to gratify, i.e. (middle voice) to derive pleasure or advantage from

G3626.strongs_def: be "ware"); a stayer at home, i.e. domestically inclined (a "good housekeeper")

G3661.derivation: adverb from a compound of the base of G3674 (ὁμοῦ) and G2372 (θυμός);

G3637.strongs_def: an eight-day old person or act

G3646.derivation: from a derivative of a compound of G3650 (ὅλος) and a derivative of G2545 (καίω);

G3631.derivation: a primary word (or perhaps of Hebrew origin (H03196));

G3676.derivation: adverb from the base of G3674 (ὁμοῦ);
G3676.strongs_def: at the same time, i.e. (conjunctionally) notwithstanding, yet still

G3659.strongs_def: a sight, i.e. (by implication) the eye

G3644.strongs_def: a ruiner, i.e. (specially), a venomous serpent

G3684.strongs_def: belonging to a ass, i.e. large (so as to be turned by a ass)

G3621.strongs_def: to manage (a house, i.e. an estate)

G3623.derivation: from G3624 (οἶκος) and the base of G3551 (νόμος);
G3623.strongs_def: a house-distributor (i.e. manager), or overseer, i.e. an employee in that capacity; by extension, a fiscal agent (treasurer); figuratively, a preacher (of the Gospel)

G3633.strongs_def: to make like (oneself), i.e. imagine (be of the opinion)

G3606.derivation: from G3739 (ὅς) with the directive enclitic of source;
G3606.strongs_def: from which place or source or cause (adverb or conjunction)

G3630.derivation: from G3631 (οἶνος) and a derivative of the alternate of G4095 (πίνω);

G3611.strongs_def: to occupy a house, i.e. reside (figuratively, inhabit, remain, inhere); by implication, to cohabit

G3617.kjv_def: goodman (of the house), householder, master of the house

G3609.strongs_def: domestic, i.e. (as noun), a relative, adherent

G3619.derivation: feminine (abstract) of a compound of G3624 (οἶκος) and the base of G1430 (δῶμα);
G3619.strongs_def: architecture, i.e. (concretely) a structure; figuratively, confirmation

G3653.strongs_def: an unripe (because out of season) fig

G3663.derivation: from G3664 (ὅμοιος) and the alternate of G3958 (πάσχω);

G3678.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of G3688 (ὄνος);

G3614.strongs_def: properly, residence (abstractly), but usually (concretely) an abode (literally or figuratively); by implication, a family (especially domestics)

G3651.strongs_def: complete to the end, i.e. absolutely perfect

G3696.derivation: probably from a primary (to be busy about);
G3696.strongs_def: an implement or utensil or tool (literally or figuratively, especially, offensive for war)

G3667.kjv_def: made like to, likeness, shape, similitude

G3652.derivation: probably a contraction from (Olympian-bestowed, i.e. heaven-descended);

G3632.derivation: from G3631 (οἶνος) and a form of the base of G5397 (φλύαρος);
G3632.strongs_def: an overflow (or surplus) of wine, i.e. vinolency (drunkenness)

G3689.derivation: adverb of the oblique cases of G5607 (ὤν);
G3689.kjv_def: certainly, clean, indeed, of a truth, verily

G3608.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of G3607 (ὀθόνη);

G3602.derivation: from a derivative of the base of G1416 (δύνω);

G3693.strongs_def: from G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι)) with enclitic of source; from the rear (as a secure aspect), i.e. at the back (adverb and preposition of place or time)

G3605.derivation: a primary verb (in a strengthened form);

G3666.strongs_def: to assimilate, i.e. compare; passively, to become similar

G3692.strongs_def: a hole (as if for light), i.e. cavern; by analogy, a spring (of water)

G3695.strongs_def: to equip (with weapons (middle voice and figuratively))

G3616.strongs_def: to be the head of (i.e. rule) a family
